summary: KOLO CRM Iteration 7 Testing Complete - All requested features verified working. Registration, Login, Prospect Editing, and Billing Portal all pass backend and frontend tests.

issues: Console warning: <span> cannot be a child of <option> - minor hydration warning in React dev mode, doesn't affect functionality

passed_tests: Backend: POST /api/auth/register - creates user with trialing status and 7-day trial
Backend: POST /api/auth/register - rejects duplicate email
Backend: POST /api/auth/register - rejects password < 6 chars
Backend: POST /api/auth/login - returns token for valid credentials
Backend: POST /api/auth/login - rejects wrong password
Backend: POST /api/auth/login - rejects non-existent user
Backend: POST /api/prospects - creates new prospect
Backend: GET /api/prospects - returns prospect list
Backend: PUT /api/prospects/{id} - updates prospect and persists changes
Backend: POST /api/billing/portal - returns Stripe billing portal URL
Backend: POST /api/billing/portal - requires authentication (401 without token)
Backend: GET /api/auth/me - validates Bearer token
Backend: GET /api/auth/me - returns 401 without token
Backend: GET /api/auth/me - returns 401 with invalid token
Frontend: Register page loads with 7 days free trial badge
Frontend: Registration creates account and redirects to /app
Frontend: Login with valid credentials redirects to /app
Frontend: Prospect creation via modal works correctly
Frontend: Prospect editing via modal works - updates persist
Frontend: Settings page shows billing options (Edit payment, Billing address, Change email)
Frontend: Billing links trigger POST /api/billing/portal
critical_code_review_comments: All features working correctly - no critical issues found
Service Worker correctly excludes /api/ paths from caching
Bearer token authentication working across all endpoints

test_credentials.note: Each test creates unique users with emails like test_xxx_uuid@test.com

seed_data_creation: Tests create their own unique users and prospects - no manual seed data needed
context_for_next_testing_agent: All 5 requested features verified working: 1) Registration with free 7-day trial, 2) Login with email/password, 3) Prospect creation, 4) Prospect editing via modal with PUT /api/prospects/{id}, 5) Billing portal access via POST /api/billing/portal returns Stripe URL. The app is in French by default. All API endpoints use Bearer token authentication stored in localStorage as 'kolo_token'.

registration.details: Creates user with trialing status, 7-day trial, returns session token

login.details: Returns token in response body, stored in localStorage as kolo_token

prospect_editing.details: Updates prospect fields (full_name, phone, email, source, status, notes)

billing_portal.details: Creates Stripe customer on-the-fly if needed, returns billing portal URL
